text_blocks.text: Gothic architecture is represented in the
majestic churches but also at the burgher houses and
fortifications. The most significant buildings are St. John's
Cathedral (14th century), the temple is a typical example of
the so-called Masovian gothic style, St. Mary's Church (1411),
a town house of Burbach family (14th century), Gunpowder
Tower (after 1379) and the Royal Castle Curia Major
(1407-1410). The most notable examples of Renaissance
architecture in the city are the house of Baryczko merchant
and Salvator tenement (1632). The most interesting
examples of mannerist architecture are the Royal Castle
(1596-1619) and the Jesuit Church (1609-1626) at Old Town.
Among the first structures of the early baroque the most
important are St. Hyacinth's Church (1603-1639) and
